metadata.title: Extra Virgin Olive Oil Tasting in Tuscany | Frantoio del Pasqua Arezzo
metadata.description: Discover the true flavors of Tuscan EVO oil. Book a tasting of extra virgin olive oil at Frantoio del Pasqua in Monte San Savino, Arezzo.
metadata.keywords: olive oil tasting tuscany, olive oil tasting arezzo, olive oil mill arezzo, tuscan extra virgin olive oil, olive oil mill tour tuscany, extra virgin olive oil tasting

hero.subtitle: Tours & tastings
hero.description: A guided sensory journey to learn how to recognize the aromas and notes of extra virgin olive oil, discover our cultivars, and experience the mill up close.

classica.title: Classic Tasting
classica.subtitle: Introduction to Delpasqua oils with guided tasting.

premium.title: Premium Tasting
premium.subtitle: Complete journey with food pairings and sensory notes.

privata.title: Private Tasting
privata.subtitle: Customized experience for groups and special occasions.

calendar.subtitle: Calendar
calendar.description: Select an available slot and complete your request. You will receive a confirmation from the administrators.

seo.subtitle: Discover more
seo.description: Live a unique experience in the heart of the Arezzo province. Frantoio del Pasqua welcomes you in Monte San Savino to reveal the secrets of Tuscan extra virgin olive oil. An authentic journey from cold pressing to sensory analysis.

features.f1_desc: Immersed in the typical and evocative Tuscan landscape.
features.f2_desc: Cold pressed in the machinery of our mill.
features.f3_desc: Learn to recognize the aromas and flavors of the cultivars.

TastingsPage.image_alt: Professional Extra Virgin Olive Oil tasting at Frantoio del Pasqua, Monte San Savino, Arezzo, Tuscany

faq.q1: Where do the tastings take place?
faq.a1: The tours and tastings take place right inside our Frantoio del Pasqua, located in Loc. Infernaccio 510/B, Monte San Savino (in the province of Arezzo). You will discover how our oil is born surrounded by the extraction machinery.
faq.q2: What does the analysis in the mill consist of?
faq.a2: We will guide you to discover our cultivars. You will learn to recognize the fruity, bitter, and spicy notes that characterize a true high-quality Tuscan extra virgin olive oil.
faq.q3: How long does the experience last and what does it include?
faq.a3: The experience lasts from 30 to 90 minutes. It includes an illustration of the continuous cycle pressing process and technical tasting, often enriched by refined gastronomic pairings.
faq.q4: Is it possible to purchase oil at the end?
faq.a4: Certainly. You can buy our cold-pressed evo oil directly in our farm shop. A perfect and exclusive souvenir of Arezzo's excellence.

header.subtitle: History
header.description: The Del Pasqua company was born around the 1960s from the work of father Sabatino. Over the years, his son Emanuele also joined the family business, with the aim of strengthening diversification, focusing on the quality of products and thus opening the company to new outlets and directions.

section1.subtitle: Our olive groves
section1.p1: Our olive groves extend over 4 hectares, divided among the typical cultivars of our area: leccino, frantoiane, and moraiolo.
section1.p2: In respect of traditional cultivation, but using modern and innovative techniques, new olive trees have been planted whose status is constantly monitored by the agronomist who evaluates the ripeness of the olives.

section2.subtitle: Our harvest
section2.p1: We always wait for October for the harvest and we enjoy working with our passions. Today we have reached a great milestone: currently, our products are appreciated locally and internationally.
section2.p2: For some years the company has been stably exporting its products to the United States. The extra virgin olive oil "Il Magnifico" is receiving increasingly high approval from the market.

philosophy.subtitle: Philosophy
philosophy.description: A family story, patient work, and constant care: quality is born from the sum of small gestures, repeated well, every year.

hero.label: Mill
hero.description: At the mill, every detail counts: from cleaning the olives to controlled malaxation, extraction, and storage. Here, technology and artisanal care work together to preserve freshness, aromas, and stability.

machines.label: Machines & Lines
machines.subtitle: Leaves removal, crushing, malaxation, extraction, separation, and filtration: every stage is designed to preserve aromas and stability.

defogliazione.title: Leaves removal
defogliazione.desc: Removal of leaves and impurities, delicate washing.

frangitura.title: Crushing
frangitura.desc: Rapid crushing to minimize heating and oxidation.

gramolazione.title: Malaxation
gramolazione.desc: Slow mixing to combine micro-drops of oil.

estrazione.title: Extraction
estrazione.desc: Separation without thermal stress, monitored parameters.

separazione.title: Separation
separazione.desc: Refinement and clarification of the oil.

filtrazione.title: Filtration
filtrazione.desc: Stability over time and clean profile.

divider_1.label: CARE AND CONSERVATION
divider_1.text: Once extracted, we protect our oil from light and oxygen. Only this way do the mill's aromas arrive intact on your table.

divider_2.label: GUARANTEED QUALITY
divider_2.text: We leave nothing to chance: from the arrival of the olives to the checks on the final product.

trasporto.title: Cleanliness and stability
trasporto.text: Inside the mill, the movement of the oil occurs exclusively through the use of steel containers. Plastic is strictly forbidden, as it imparts off-flavors to the oil, spoiling its taste and smell.

stoccaggio.title: Storage under nitrogen
stoccaggio.text: Space to tell about storage in silos, temperature control, and protection from oxidation to preserve aromas and polyphenols.

imbottigliamento.title: Filling and packaging line
imbottigliamento.text: Space to describe the line, formats, labeling, and packaging. Ideal to add a wide photo of the line.

controllo.title: Quality and traceability
controllo.text: Space to indicate controls, lot traceability, management of deliveries and (if present) a small laboratory/tasting corner.

technology.label: The Mill
technology.description: In our mill, every phase is designed to protect aromas and polyphenols: rapid delivery, careful cleaning, cold extraction, and storage in controlled conditions.

chain.title: Short chain
chain.desc: From harvest to milling in rapid times.

clean.title: Cleaning and selection
clean.desc: Leaves removal and washing to eliminate impurities.

extraction.title: Cold extraction
extraction.desc: Controlled process to preserve quality and aromas.

molitura.title: Milling for third parties
molitura.text: Milling and packaging processing with lot traceability.

conferimento.title: Olive delivery
conferimento.text: Reception and management with priority on freshness.

controlli.title: Quality controls
controlli.text: Monitoring of process and storage parameters.

visite.title: Visits and tastings
visite.text: Moments of visit to discover the processing phases.

steps_section.label: Production
steps_section.subtitle: Harvest, processing, and certifications: the stages that guide the quality of our extra virgin olive oil.

brucatura.title: Hand picking
paragraphs: Even today in Tuscany, much of the olive harvest takes place traditionally, with hand picking; the olives transported to the mill are then processed within 24 hours to safeguard the integrity of the aromatic and phenolic components. The Del Pasqua Mill is equipped with a modern Alfalaval olive processing plant with cold extraction.

imbottigliamento.title: The bottling line
paragraphs: The plant is equipped with a line for bottling and packaging; and a nitrogen storage to guarantee the organoleptic characteristics of our 'Il Magnifico' oil while waiting for bottling.
But we don't stop here: we perform milling and packaging processes for third parties.

evo.title: Our EVO Oil
paragraphs: All these factors are an absolute guarantee for the production of extra virgin olive oil of the highest quality, capable of preserving the freshness and aromas that characterize freshly squeezed oil for longer.

igp_bio.title: IGP AND BIO
paragraphs: The Del Pasqua mill is certified Suolo e Salute for the transformation and production of Bio products and is registered with the Tuscan Oil Consortium for the production of IGP Toscano extra virgin olive oil.

intro.title: Our EVO oil
body: Our Italian extra virgin olive oil is not only born from olives grown with respect for the environment; but all activities for its processing are subject to the control regime of recognized bodies to guarantee the end consumer a natural, controlled, and certified product.

fruttato_leggero.title: Extra Virgin Olive Oil - Light Fruity 100% Italian
body: Delicate and harmonious profile: light bitterness and spiciness, with herbaceous sensations and soft notes.
Ideal raw on light dishes, fish, vegetables, and salads.

fruttato_intenso.title: Extra Virgin Olive Oil - Intense Fruity 100% Italian
body: With a strong but balanced flavor, the bitterness and spiciness are at a medium-high level, with an aftertaste tending towards artichoke, bright green color.
The harvest takes place in advance of complete maturation.

fruttato_medio.title: Extra Virgin Olive Oil - Medium Fruity 100% Italian
body: Blend of leccino, frantoio, and moraiolo olives; balanced in spiciness and bitterness, with hints of almond and a light sensation of grass.

evo.title: Extra Virgin Olive Oil - EVO
body: With the selection of the best olives, our 'EVO' oil is born, cold extracted according to the principles of tradition and with an eye on innovation. Bright green color and herbaceous scent with hints of almond.

aromatico.title: Aromatic Oils - Extra Virgin Olive Oil
body: Our special selection of aromatized oils.
Available versions: truffle, chili and lemon.
